title: Master the Art of Texting Women
text: sometimes you might even start in the attraction stage so let's begin with the first stage the silence stage in this stage the girl doesn't respond or takes a long time to reply or she might not seem interested in this case you should avoid overwhelming her with messages don't send too many and don't ask for anything that requires a response most importantly don't bring up a date the only thing you can do is leave a simple comment like reacting to her story or saying something that doesn't require a reply the goal here is to maintain your value and not show any neediness even if she doesn't respond the second stage is the testing stage here the girl might start provoking you talking about someone else or disagreeing with you this stage is relatively easy because all you need to do is pass her tests I'll explain this more in a dedicated video but briefly here are some ways to pass these tests one completely ignore what she said two take a comment and turn it into a joke three give a response that's completely unrelated to what she said in this stage don't ask for a date yet because attraction is still being built stage three is the conversation stage where the conversation flows more naturally and might even involve exchanging voice messages at this point you can ask for a date in this stage I want you to apply everything you've learned in this series like qualifying techniques or asking emotional questions and try to incorporate them into your texting but remember texting is slightly different from talking on the phone or having a face-to-face conversation to
